{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Norian
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Norian]] is a guard in the [[Imperial Palace]], but he is not an [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Norian]] used an [[Awakened bell]] to sound an alarm.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
